headline: Guggenheim Lifts Target (TGT) PT, Sees Turnaround Gaining Traction
summary: Target Corporation (NYSE:TGT) is included among the 10 Best Dividend Aristocrat Stocks to Buy in 2026. On April 20, John Heinbockel at Guggenheim Partners raised the price recommendation on Target Corporation (NYSE:TGT) to $140 from $130. It reiterated a Buy rating on the shares. The analyst said year-to-date outperformance has “eliminated the turnaround’s ‘free look,’ […]
